name: GENCO SHIPPING & TRADING LTD
sic_description: Deep Sea Foreign Transportation of  Freight
summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited is a New York City-based pure-play drybulk ship owning company focused on seaborne transportation of commodities globally. It transports iron ore, coal, grain, bauxite, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. After expected deliveries in March 2026, its fleet will consist of 45 drybulk vessels including Newcastlemax, Capesize, Ultramax, and Supramax vessels with approximately 5,044,000 dwt aggregate capacity.
